name: EmbeddedConfig
description: Schema-driven, transport-agnostic configuration engine for ESP32. One field table drives NVS load/save (with board templates for defaults + legacy-key migration), a JSON dump, web-form apply, and a serial console (human + machine/AI grammar). The consumer project provides config_schema.h (the Config struct + field tables) and config_enums.h (structural constants).
keywords: config, configuration, nvs, preferences, esp32, schema, serial, settings
